query_texts:
WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (35000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[archive_binary10] (id, val)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CASE WHEN n % 500 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(CAST(n AS VARBINARY(4)) AS BINARY(10)) END
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (35000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[archive_char10] (id, val)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CASE WHEN n % 500 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(n AS CHAR(10)) END
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (35000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[archive_nchar10] (id, val)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CASE WHEN n % 500 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(n AS NCHAR(10)) END
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (35000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[archive_nvarchar20] (id, val)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CASE WHEN n % 500 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(n AS NVARCHAR(20)) END
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (35000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[archive_uuid] (id, val)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CASE WHEN n % 500 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(HASHBYTES('MD5', CAST(n AS VARCHAR(10))) AS UNIQUEIDENTIFIER) END
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (35000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[archive_varbinary20] (id, val)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CASE WHEN n % 500 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(n AS VARBINARY(4)) END
FROM nums

WITH nums AS (
    SELECT TOP (35000)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.object_id, b.object_id) AS n
    FROM sys.all_columns a
    CROSS JOIN sys.all_columns b
)
INSERT INTO [dbo].[archive_varchar20] (id, val)
SELECT
    CAST(n AS INT),
    CASE WHEN n % 500 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(n AS VARCHAR(20)) END
FROM nums
